note: Declarative board->official-source ingestion manifest. Adding a board is a data entry here, not code. The extractor (ingest-from-manifest.js) fetches url, hashes it, slices line_range, extracts the named #define macros, and emits source-backed fact-pack entries. No per-board pin values are hardcoded in code.

pins.claim: Primary I2C SDA from official Factory utilities.h
Primary I2C SCL from official Factory utilities.h
GPS UART RX (ESP receives) from official Factory utilities.h
GPS UART TX (ESP transmits) from official Factory utilities.h
LoRa SPI SCLK from official Factory utilities.h
LoRa SPI MISO from official Factory utilities.h
LoRa SPI MOSI from official Factory utilities.h
LoRa SPI NSS/CS from official Factory utilities.h
LoRa reset from official Factory utilities.h
LoRa DIO0 (SX127x) from official Factory utilities.h
LoRa DIO1 from official Factory utilities.h
LoRa BUSY (SX1262) / DIO2 from official Factory utilities.h

buses.claim: Primary I2C bus from official Factory utilities.h

buses.template: LoRa radio on SPI: SCLK=GPIO{RADIO_SCLK_PIN}, MISO=GPIO{RADIO_MISO_PIN}, MOSI=GPIO{RADIO_MOSI_PIN}, CS=GPIO{RADIO_CS_PIN}, RST=GPIO{RADIO_RST_PIN}, DIO0=GPIO{RADIO_DIO0_PIN}, DIO1=GPIO{RADIO_DIO1_PIN}, BUSY=GPIO{RADIO_BUSY_PIN}
buses.claim: LoRa SPI bus from official Factory utilities.h

buses.template: GPS on UART: RX=GPIO{GPS_RX_PIN}, TX=GPIO{GPS_TX_PIN}, 9600 baud
buses.claim: GPS UART bus from official Factory utilities.h
